---
title: &TITLE "Shengjie Qian"
last: Qian
first: Shengjie
people_group: "postdoc"
email: "jennie.qian98@gmail.com"
education:
  - "Ph.D. Computational Chemistry | Southern University of Science and Technology | 2025 <br> B.Sc. Applied Chemistry | Central South University | 2020"
subtitle: "Postdoctoral Researcher"
description: ""
image: avatar.jpg
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jennie.qian98@gmail.com
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: ../../CVs/CV_Shengjie_Qian.pdf
---

<hr>

:::{#about}

Shengjie is a postdoctoral researcher in the STREAM Group. Her PhD work at the Southern University of Science and Technology focused on computational chemistry of electrocatalytic systems, including ammonia synthesis, constant-potential methods, and machine-learning-accelerated simulations of electrochemical interfaces.

## Education
{{< meta education >}}

:::
